titleStmt.title: SII 30.173: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 173. (A.R. No. 251 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīśvara temple: on the south wall Rajā[dhi]rāja-Chōḻa I: year 31: 1049 A.D.

summary.p: Built in and damaged. It records the sale of 46 kuḻi of land for nine kaḻañju of gold by the ūr assembly of Omānaṇḍattūr to temple of Sri Pōndaiuḍaiya Mahādēva in order to provide food offerings to the devotees who thronged for worship to the temple on the occasion of festival days. The land was declared as tax free.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrācātirāca tevarkku yāṇṭu muppattoṉṟāvatu kāliyūrk koṭṭattu sakāyirampeṭu nāṭṭu mo
ma nāṭṭu parākkiramacoḻa catir(v)vetimaṅkalattu śrīpontai Uṭaiya mātevar tiruviḻā cevikkavan=ta Aṭiyār śrīpa
teṇṇāyiravaṉ maṭappuṟamāka Ātitā[sa]caṇṭecuvaraṉ pakkal koṇṭa poṉ Oṉpatiṉ kaḻañcu Ippoṉ Oṉpatiṉ kaḻa
kku kiḻpārkkellai noti pāṭikku poṉavatikku meṟkum teṉpākkellai ceṟuvuḻān kaṇṭarāccaṉ pūmikku vaṭa
kku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai peruntūmpiṉ niṉṟu meṭukaḷukku nīrpāñca vākkālukku teṟku Ināṟpārkkellaikkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam taṭi mu
ṟṟu nāṟpattāṟu kuḻiyum poṉ Oṉpatiṉ kaḻañcu koṇṭu Ipponukku viruttikkum Ippūmiyāl van=ta Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaiyum
ceytu kuṭuttom Ippari coṭṭi nirvilaiyum An=tarāyamum cilliṟaiyum Uḻaviṟaiyum kāṭṭik koḷḷap peṟātomākavum miṉnila
rkaḷḷākavum Ipparicu Icai viṟṟukkuṭuttom Omānaṇṭat tūrom Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻutineṉ ceṟuvuḻān kaṇṭarāccan
ḻāṉa mukkaṭampaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ cūṟṟi Aṭṭa mūrttiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ ceḻuvaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ
kiḻāṉ kaṇṭarātittaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ piccaṉayyanikkiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ maṇimutta mūrttiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ civappirāmaṇa
Aṟiveṉ cokiyempa
Digital edition of SII 30.173 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
